subject: Fw: 10/10
body:
----- Original Message -----
From: petra@happyheartsfund.org <petra@happyheartsfund.org>
To: Jeffrey- Epstein <kellens@earthlink.net>; Sarah
Sent: Tue Oct 02 20:39:37 2007
Subject: 10/10

Dear Sarah,
I'm sorry that you didn't get the invite.

Here is the email invitation for a meaningful and magical event which Happy Hearts Fund is organizing.  It is the "Heart of Gold Ball" on October 10th in NY. All 100 percent of the proceeds from the night will go directly to children. 

http://happyheartsfund.org/heartofgold/index.html

The new adition is the  performance of "Cirque de Solai" :-) They R quite amazing.

It will be life changing night for so many little once and also night full of fun.

Would be wonderful to see U there :-)

Lots of love light and happiness
P.
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra
